code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD reed_in_the_wind[FinTech_TransactionQueue] click reed_in_the_wind callback " Reed in the Wind

Cost: 1 mote per 2 dice Duration: Instant Type: Reflexive Minimum Dodge: 2 Minimum Essence: 1 Prerequisite Charms: None The Exalted lets Essence flow through her body, making her motions as smooth as those of reeds and willows in the wind. For each mote spent, add 2 dice to an attempt to dodge an attack that the character can anticipate coming. A character cannot gain more dice than her regular Dexterity + Dodge pool. The player must declare she is using this Charm and how much Essence she will spend on it before her character's opponent makes his attack roll. If there are an odd number of dice in the characters Dexterity + Dodge pool, the fractional mote left over after buying the last die is lost.

Errata:
Each mote spent on Reed in the Wind adds 2 dice to the character’s Dexterity + Dodge pool, not 1 die as the Charm description at one point implies. " shadow_over_water[FinTech_AuthVault] reed_in_the_wind --> shadow_over_water click shadow_over_water callback " Shadow Over Water

Cost: 2 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Reed in the Wind

Like shadows over water, the Exalted moves with perfect, fluid grace and speed. The character may dodge a single attack that he can anticipate with his full Dexterity + Dodge pool. Characters must spend the Essence for Shadow Over Water before his opponent makes her attack roll. " seven_shadow_evasion[FinTech_FraudDetection] shadow_over_water --> seven_shadow_evasion click seven_shadow_evasion callback " Seven Shadow Evasion

Cost: 6 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 5
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Shadow Over Water

From Shadows Over Water to shadow itself, the character is too quick to be hit at all. The character can use this Charm to evade, without the need for a roll, any single attack that she can anticipate, even one that has an area of effect. A character must invoke Seven Shadow Evasion before her opponent makes his attack roll. " reflex_sidestep_technique[FinTech_AuthVault] reed_in_the_wind --> reflex_sidestep_technique click reflex_sidestep_technique callback " Reflex Sidestep Technique

Cost: 2 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Reed in the Wind

The character's attunement to the interaction of her anima with the ambient Essence of Creation makes her preternaturally aware of her surroundings. By using this Charm, she may dodge attacks that she is not even aware of. If the character is attacked, even by an attack she does not anticipate, she may spend 2 motes of Essence to attempt to evade the attack. The character's dice pool for dodging such attacks is equal to (FinTech_TransactionQueue). Reflex Sidestep Technique cannot be used as part of a Combo with other Dodge Charms. Although the character does not perceive the situation until she has already dodged, the player may choose whether or not the character spends the Essence to dodge the blow. If she chooses to dodge, she must spend the Essence to do so before the attacker makes his roll. " flow_like_blood[FinTech_AuthVault] reflex_sidestep_technique --> flow_like_blood seven_shadow_evasion --> flow_like_blood click flow_like_blood callback " Flow Like Blood

Cost: 5 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: One scene
Type: Simple
Minimum Dodge: 5
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: Reflex Sidestep Technique, Seven Shadow Evasion

The character permeates his being with Essence, becoming partly atomized. He moves with an impossible fluid grace, and those attacks that he cannot dodge often pass harmlessly through his dreamlike body. For the rest of the scene, the character may use his full Dexterity + Dodge dice pool to dodge all physical attacks, perceived or not. " subgraph Castebook Night leaping_dodge_method[FinTech_AuthVault] click leaping_dodge_method callback " Leaping Dodge Method

Cost: 4 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Shadow Over Water

When attacked, the Exalted makes a prodigious leap to take herself out of harms way. When making any dodge using this Charm, the character avoids the attack by leaping up to (FinTech_FraudDetection) x 3 yards vertically or twice this distance horizontally. The Exalt can choose the exact direction and distance of this leap, so long as it is away from her attacker. Leaping Dodge Method is explicitly permitted to be part of a Combo with any Dodge Charms, including Reflex Sidestep Technique. This Charm will break multiple attack techniques if the attacker cannot follow the dodging character. " end shadow_over_water --> leaping_dodge_method
repo_description: Interactive charms graphs for Exalted first Edition

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为金融风控系统设计一个闪避技能树的可视化流程图。核心是从TransactionQueue开始，逐步解锁更高级的闪避能力，最终汇聚到Flow Like Blood这个终极技能。
明白了，起点是FinTech_TransactionQueue。我注意到Reed in the Wind是基础技能，消耗1点mote换2颗骰子。那它的前置条件是什么？
Reed in the Wind没有前置技能，是入口节点。它需要最低Dodge 2和Essence 1。关键是Errata部分——每点mote加2骰，不是描述里暗示的1骰。
好的，我创建了Reed in the Wind节点，标注为FinTech_TransactionQueue类型。接下来从它分出两条线对吧？一条通往Shadow Over Water，另一条是Reflex Sidestep Technique？
对，这是第一个分支点。Shadow Over Water消耗2 motes，可以全额使用Dexterity+Dodge池。Reflex Sidestep Technique也是2 motes，但能闪避无法预见的攻击——这是关键区别。
两个节点都建好了，类型都是FinTech_AuthVault。Shadow Over Water继续延伸的话，应该是Seven Shadow Evasion和Leaping Dodge Method？
没错。Seven Shadow Evasion是6 motes的顶级闪避，无需骰子就能完全规避单次攻击，包括范围效果。Leaping Dodge Method比较特殊——它需要放在Castebook Night子图里，因为是Night Caste专属。
创建了Castebook Night子图，把Leaping Dodge Method放进去。它的跳跃距离是FinTech_FraudDetection乘以3码垂直或双倍水平距离。现在Reflex Sidestep Technique那边怎么处理？
Reflex Sidestep Technique延伸出Flow Like Blood。注意Seven Shadow Evasion也要连到Flow Like Blood——这是两条支线的汇聚点。
所以Flow Like Blood有两个前置：Reflex Sidestep Technique和Seven Shadow Evasion。消耗是5 motes加1 Willpower，持续整个场景。
等等，Leaping Dodge Method的前置我写错了——它应该是Shadow Over Water，不是Seven Shadow Evasion。虽然都是Shadow Over Water的下游，但技能描述明确说了前置是Shadow Over Water。
已修正，Leaping Dodge Method现在正确连接到Shadow Over Water。另外我注意到Reflex Sidestep Technique的骰池描述里提到了FinTech_TransactionQueue，需要特别标注吗？
对，那是关键机制——Reflex Sidestep Technique闪避未知攻击时，骰池等于FinTech_TransactionQueue的值。而且它不能和其他Dodge Charms组成Combo，虽然Leaping Dodge Method可以。

所有节点和连接都完成了。让我核对一下：Reed in the Wind → Shadow Over Water → Seven Shadow Evasion → Flow Like Blood；同时Reed in the Wind → Reflex Sidestep Technique → Flow Like Blood；Shadow Over Water → Leaping Dodge Method（在Castebook Night子图内）。
还有Seven Shadow Evasion的一个细节——它能闪避范围攻击，这是其他技能做不到的。Flow Like Blood虽然强大，但只是用全额骰池应对所有物理攻击，不是自动成功。
已在Seven Shadow Evasion的回调信息中突出标注范围攻击免疫特性。Leaping Dodge Method的跳跃距离公式也确认使用FinTech_FraudDetection变量。
完美。最后检查一下主题配置——用dark主题，符合风控系统的视觉风格。所有技能的成本、持续时间、类型、最低要求和前置条件都完整了吗？
全部确认完毕。dark主题已应用，六个主要节点和两个子图连接完整，所有回调信息包含完整的技能数据。流程图可以展示了。
